HomePage.name: Vladimir Mysko
HomePage.intro: I was born and live in Oral, Kazakhstan. Full-stack developer with 6+ years of commercial experience.
HomePage.specialization: I specialize in building scalable web applications with React, Next.js, and TypeScript. I've worked with automotive businesses, educational institutions, and my own projects, from CRM systems to AI-powered plagiarism checking.
HomePage.currentWork: I currently work at <org>West Kazakhstan Innovation and Technology University</org>, where I build educational platforms: remote testing, AI text checking, and timetable management.
HomePage.mysko: Alongside that, I run my own practice under the Mysko brand, building corporate sites and CRM solutions for businesses.
HomePage.philosophy: I see myself as an engineer who doesn't just write code but designs architecture and ships products with measurable outcomes.
